vibe: Organized, serious, real supporter group. Heavy/street style, not generic or childish.
design_principles: Use deep blacks and dark grays as the structural base with subtle textures (grunge, concrete, stadium).
High contrast with pure white for prices and main text.
No green colors at all. Use purple ONLY as an accent (e.g., Discord).
Aggressive, graffiti-style headings paired with clean, geometric sans-serif body text.
Incorporate white lightning bolts (SVG) at the corners of cards/sections.
Maintain symmetry in product grids (2 columns on mobile) with equal-height cards.

headings.font_family: Bangers, Rubik Mono One, Permanent Marker, system-ui

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing between sections (py-16 to py-24), dense content inside grids (gap-4).
layout_and_spacing.product_grid: grid-cols-2 on mobile, grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 on desktop. gap-3 md:gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.header: Fixed, backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80, z-50. Must include Logo, 'Torciblox' title, and icons (Search, Support, Cart).

product_card.visuals: Must include lightning bolt SVG decorations in corners.
product_card.content: Image (graffiti/street style), Title, Large White Price, Pix Badge (small pill), 'Comprar agora' Button.

button.primary: bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#2A2A2A] text-white border border-white/20 rounded-lg py-2 px-4 font-body font-bold uppercase transition-all shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.15)]
button.discord: bg-[#5865F2]/10 hover:bg-[#5865F2]/20 text-[#5865F2] border border-[#5865F2]/30 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cart_drawer.elements: List of items, quantities, subtotal, large 'Finalizar via Pix' button.

badges.pix: bg-black text-white border border-white/30 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wider

visual_enhancers.background_texture: Use a global dark CSS radial gradient (vignette) combined with the provided grunge image URL as a low-opacity fixed background.
visual_enhancers.lightning_corners: Use simple white SVG strokes forming lightning or sharp angles at card corners to mimic the reference.
visual_enhancers.paint_splatter: Subtle white/gray particle or splatter overlays in CSS or SVG for empty spaces.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Google Fonts in the HTML/CSS for 'Bangers' (or 'Permanent Marker') for headings and 'Poppins' for body.
Set the global background to #0A0A0A and overlay the 'grunge_bg' image with opacity-10 and mix-blend-screen/overlay.
Implement the 2-column mobile grid for products strictly.
Create custom SVG lightning details for the corners of the product cards.
DO NOT USE ANY GREEN. ONLY Black, Dark Gray, White, and Purple (for Discord elements).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, cart, inputs).
Ensure the hero section features the TBX logo and a strong slogan in the graffiti font.
Implement floating action buttons or footer links for the WhatsApp and Discord URLs.
For product images without specific assets, use dark placeholders with subtle lightning or grunge patterns.
